strings.panel.p1.narration.1: Welcome to the world of the classic video game Kid Radd.
strings.panel.p2.narration.1: Meet Radd, the hero of the game.
strings.panel.p3.narration.1: This strip will follow the exploits of Radd, heroic dude and all-around cool guy.
strings.panel.p4.narration.1: Of course by "cool," we mean by mid-1980's standards.
